svg.text: Candidate Fig. 5 asset pack: PAR1 control and autosomal PHR-compatible pedigree patches
Existing WashU odgi-untangle patch calls; same-chromosome background is subdued and non-homologous donor arms are semantically highlighted.
A PAR1 positive control: paternal chrX p maps to chrY p
Main chrYp block: 0-143,431 bp; mean/min score 0.9998/0.9933; C15/C15.
Known male PAR1 X/Y recombination sanity check; not autosomal PHR evidence.
B PAN027 autosomal candidate: chr9 q terminal patch mostly chr3 q
Terminal switch after 446.9 kb is mostly chr3q; chr15q is cross-
community secondary; chr20q tail is low-confidence.
Candidate terminal PHR exchange patch; not a clean full crossover.
C Independent PAN028 support: chr3 q terminal patch maps to chr9 q
Independent candidate compatible with chr3q/chr9q C3 exchange.
Deliberately selected review set; not a genome-wide rediscovery run.
